text:
Created attachment 256237
Xorg.log

After upgrade from stable/13 to stable/14 I've got a fatal error on Xorg.
=====
[    18.486] (II) NVIDIA(0): Setting mode "DFP-2:nvidia-auto-select"
[    18.586] (EE) 
Fatal server error:
[    18.587] (EE) Caught signal 12 (Bad system call). Server aborting
=====

Tested on Quadro K600 and GT730.

x11/nvidia-driver with GT 1030 works success.
